name: Path to the Goal
short_description: The protagonist, who aims to become a professional soccer player, sets out on a journey of training! Overcome various obstacles to become a professional soccer player!
detailed_description:
The protagonist, who aims to become a professional soccer player, sets out on a journey of training!

Overcome various obstacles to become a professional soccer player!

Game Contents

Control the protagonist to kick the ball and overcome various obstacles as you aim for the goal.

Kicking isn't just about striking the ball—there are many different techniques.
It's important to master a variety of moves, such as deciding which foot to kick with, adding curve, and choosing whether to kick the ball high or low.

Use these different techniques to reach the goal!

As the game progresses, the difficulty increases, making it harder to clear stages.
When you're stuck, try experimenting with different kinds of kicks.

Additionally, make use of the practice ball and the sliding feature, which allows you to quickly retry after failing, so you can keep challenging yourself!

Gameplay Video and Distribution Guidelines

You can publish and distribute gameplay videos without permission.

Credit notation is not required.

The developer is not responsible for any damage caused by publishing and distributing gameplay videos of this game.

These guidelines are subject to change.
